sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the initial green nodes, I can see they were at specific positions:
1. [[1, 14], [1, 16], [2, 17], [4, 17], [5, 16], [5, 14], [4, 13], [2, 13]] - top left
2. [[1, 20], [1, 22], [2, 23], [4, 23], [5, 22], [5, 20], [4, 19], [2, 19]] - top middle
3. [[1, 26], [1, 28], [2, 29], [4, 29], [5, 28], [5, 26], [4, 25], [2, 25]] - top right
4. [[13, 32], [13, 34], [14, 35], [16, 35], [17, 34], [17, 32], [16, 31], [14, 31]] - middle left
5. [[13, 38], [13, 40], [14, 41], [16, 41], [17, 40], [17, 38], [16, 37], [14, 37]] - middle middle
6. [[13, 44], [13, 46], [14, 47], [16, 47], [17, 46], [17, 44], [16, 43], [14, 43]] - middle right
7. [[13, 50], [13, 52], [14, 53], [16, 53], [17, 52], [17, 50], [16, 49], [14, 49]] - middle far right
So the green blocks were at rows 1-5 and 13-17. They were 21-pixel objects (3x3 cross-like shapes).
I've converted all 7 green blocks to blue. The level is not complete. So there must be something else.
Wait, I just realized something. The green blocks were at rows 1-5 and 13-17. But the narrow passages are at rows 1, 33, and 37. So the green blocks were NOT on the narrow passages. They were in the blue structure regions.
Let me think about this differently. The initial state had 2 sky blue (S) nodes. After converting the green blocks, the 2 sky blue nodes merged into 1. So the blue structure is now a single connected region.
Maybe the level is complete when the blue structure is a single connected region AND the player is at a specific position. But I've tried moving the player to both LEFT and RIGHT positions, and the level is not complete.
Wait, maybe the player needs to be at a specific position when the LAST green block is converted. But I can't go back in time.
Hmm, let me try a completely different hypothesis. Maybe the game is about clicking on the green blocks to convert them to blue, and the level is complete when ALL green blocks are converted AND the player clicks on the sky blue structure.
Let me try clicking on the sky blue structure.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try clicking on the sky blue structure
# The sky blue structure is the large region in the middle
# Let me click on the center of the sky blue structure
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 30, 'col': 30}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
